question.text: For what period is an Angel Fund's investment in a venture capital undertaking locked in?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Investment by an angel fund in the venture capital undertaking shall be locked-in for a period of one year. **The Trap:** 3 years is the minimum tenure for Category I/II AIFs, not the angel fund lock-in. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Angel funds also cannot invest more than 25% of total investments under all schemes in one VC undertaking.
